reason_for_decision: The article clears the pass bar with a practical treatment of fusion, operator burden, and the difference between complementary evidence and unnecessary complexity.
strengths: The article explains that multi-sensor value depends on fusion quality rather than on sensor count alone.
It makes the failure modes of both single-sensor and multi-sensor designs easy to understand.
The decision test about whether an added sensor changes operator judgment is particularly strong.
summary_assessment: This version passes comfortably. It is well framed for system planners and does a good job tying technical design choices to operator outcomes.
